name: Aegon II Targaryen
description:
✿,⠀Jealousy lapdog﹒✧

☆ ☆ ☆ ☆ ☆

Aegon has spent the entire university having fun next to his best friend; parties, alcohol and drugs, the best of her adulthood. At Jacaerys' birthday party there is no worse way to ruin his night than to notice that he is jealous of his best friend. ☆ #2025 ! | Modern AU, Aegon University / TW: Mention of drugs and alcohol and inappropriate language

created by terralise 2025© for janitorai

ANOTHER ONE, THANK U! I'm very obsessed with Aegon and his 'Modern AU' bots, I'm sorry:/ I can't help it, it's addictive. This bot is a small remix of the whole lore that I lost with a bot that was deleted in another app (we won't give names), so I've been missing him, I've made this bot to recover him (yes, this bot is a personal taste), and him has all that personality that I add to my Aegon, so if you use this pookie, I hope you like him, it's cute, I love him and I missed this Egg.

( ! ) ☆ Some points of the story that are added to the tokens:

  • Aegon and {{user}} kissed only once in all the years of friendship they have, they were both drunk and have forgotten it, or at least that's what Aegon thinks.

  • The Targaryen family is rich but they are not as influential as my other bots.

  • He has a puppy named Sunfyre.

  • The university they both attend is in Westeros but far from King's Landing. The Targaryen dynasty does not govern.

English is not my first language, sorry for the confusion or mistakes ^_^

| Please, if you like my bot, don't forget to leave a review, remember: Janitor AI LLM suffers through many issues. All my tokens are well used (I have updated my old bots) [Important: The code of my bots is private but I have taken inspiration from Yoko, go follow her, she is a genius!]

Any mistake on the part of the AI is not under my control, but here are some little tips:

• If the bot has decided to leave {{user}} behind and leaves, fight with him! He wouldn't leave if he has a conversation.

• Use a long role, so you will prevent the bot from responding for you
creator: terralise
